# Email Marketing in 2024

## Hook

Email marketing remains a powerful channel for B2B companies despite predictions of its decline. The data consistently shows strong ROI for organisations that invest in proper segmentation and personalisation.

## Body

Companies with mature email programmes report returns that significantly outperform other owned channels. Personalisation tools have made it easier to deliver relevant content at scale.

## Concession

Privacy regulations have created real friction. List sizes have declined and compliance costs have increased for many organisations.

## Conclusion

Email remains the highest-ROI owned channel for B2B marketing leaders who invest in the right infrastructure.
